title: effusiella hians
intro: Effusiella hians, also known as the coralroot or coralroot orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. It is native to North America, particularly in the western regions, and is known for its distinctive coral-red or pink flowers. The medicinal properties of Effusiella hians include its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve digestive issues, making it a popular treatment for various gastrointestinal problems. Effusiella hians has been used in traditional herbal medicine to prepare remedies such as tinctures, infusions, and salves, which have been reported to provide health benefits including relief from nausea, diarrhea, and stomach pain.
